text: At 2026-05-16T03:44:12, Windows Security Event 4624 on WS-FINANCE-07.corp.local recorded a successful network (remote file share or named pipe) logon for user "CORP\Administrator" from IP 10.0.14.22 (workstation: WS-FINANCE-07) using NTLM. Authentication used NTLM rather than Kerberos for a network logon, which may indicate pass-the-hash or legacy authentication (T1550.002 (Use Alternate Authentication Material: Pass the Hash)).
